CustomField.description: True if this account’s Date of First Delinquency is with 6 years of today, false if not.
CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Distressed_Account', IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Charged_Off_Date__c)), IF(TODAY() - (Charged_Off_Date__c - 240) > 2192, True, False), True), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Last_Payment_Date__c)), IF( TODAY() - Last_Payment_Date__c > 2192, True, False), IF( TODAY() - Disbursement_Date__c > 2192, True, False) ))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True if this account’s Date of First Delinquency is with 6 years of today, false if not.
CustomField.label: DFD expired (>6 years)
